question.label: Clearer criteria
question.name: What would clearer criteria look like to you in practice?
question.description: Drills into the specific criteria he feels are missing so the recognition gap becomes concrete.

answer: I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing condition for growth — real authority to own bigger direction — which is a strong negative growth signal; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'real authority' should be picked up next session.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help you make the next few weeks feel more deliberate?

new_queue.label: Concrete next move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.
